title: Sidebar navigation component with active state highlighting
purpose: Provides a responsive sidebar navigation for the Codex dashboard with active link highlighting and dark mode support.
module_context: Exports a Sidebar component with navigation items and a NavIcon helper function. Defines NavItem type and SidebarProps interface. Includes SVG icon definitions for different navigation items.

steps.content: Determine the CSS class for the icon based on provided className or use default size classes.
Select the appropriate SVG icon component based on the icon name.
Return the selected SVG icon with the determined CSS class.
Render the sidebar container with fixed width and dark mode background.
Display the application logo and title in the header section.
Map through the navigation items to create clickable links.
For each navigation item, determine if it matches the active path.
Apply active state styling to the matching navigation item.
Render each navigation link with appropriate icon and text.
Display the application version in the footer section.
